dynamic.label: Linear Demand
dynamic.summary: Price rises linearly with demand heat.

params.label: Slope k
params.description: Price increase per 1 demand heat. Falls back to Step when empty.

dynamic.label: Diminishing Return
dynamic.summary: Rises quickly early, then gradually approaches a ceiling.

params.label: Amplitude a
params.description: Controls early-stage premium. Falls back to Step when empty.

params.label: Damping b
params.description: Higher values flatten the curve sooner.

dynamic.label: Log Smoothing
dynamic.summary: Uses a logarithmic curve for smooth growth in high-frequency trades.

params.label: Smoothing alpha
params.description: Controls logarithmic sensitivity.

dynamic.label: Exponential Defense
dynamic.summary: Grows faster as demand increases, suited for scarcity protection.

params.label: Exponent beta
params.description: Typical range: 0.01 to 0.05.

dynamic.label: Threshold Step
dynamic.summary: Gentle growth before threshold, faster growth after threshold.

params.label: Threshold T
params.description: Switches to k2 when demand exceeds this value.

params.label: Slope k1
params.description: Used when D_t <= T. Falls back to Step when empty.

params.label: Slope k2
params.description: Used when D_t > T, recommended larger than k1.

dynamic.label: Elasticity
dynamic.summary: Elastic parameters control how sensitive price is to demand shifts.

params.label: Elasticity eta
params.description: eta < 1 smooths movement, eta > 1 increases sensitivity.

params.label: Smoothing epsilon
params.description: Prevents zero division and softens low-demand noise.

params.label: Reference demand D0
params.description: Anchor point of the elasticity curve.

dynamic.label: Panic Buying
dynamic.summary: After threshold, price enters accelerated growth to model panic buying.

params.label: Panic threshold T
params.description: Quadratic acceleration starts after this threshold.

params.label: Linear slope k
params.description: Base linear component. Falls back to Step when empty.

params.label: Quadratic gain gamma
params.description: Controls post-threshold quadratic acceleration.

auction.label: English Auction
auction.summary: Open ascending bids with anti-sniping auto extension.

params.label: Reserve Price
params.description: Optional. Auction fails if reserve is not reached.

params.label: Anti-sniping trigger window (sec)
params.description: If a bid arrives in the last N seconds, extension is triggered.

params.label: Single extension length (sec)
params.description: Adds M seconds to the deadline per trigger.

auction.label: Dutch Auction
auction.summary: Price declines over time; first buyer closes the lot immediately.

params.label: Floor Price
params.description: Lower bound of descending price; cannot exceed start price.

params.label: Duration (seconds)
params.description: Total descending window from start toward floor.

auction.label: Vickrey Sealed Auction
auction.summary: Sealed bids; highest bidder wins but pays second price.

params.label: Reserve Price
params.description: Optional. Auction fails if highest bid does not reach reserve.

auction.label: Candle Auction
auction.summary: Open bidding with randomized hidden extension window.

params.label: Base Duration (seconds)
params.description: Public minimum duration before random extension is applied.

params.label: Max Random Extension (seconds)
params.description: System randomly adds 0..N seconds after public end.

params.label: Reserve Price
params.description: Optional. Auction fails if reserve is not reached.
